text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Oaks. Spectators'
expectations are running high thanks to Hishi
Amazon's strong performance at the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Similarly, Narita Brian crushed the Satsuki Sho,
winning the first leg of the Triple Crown. Hishi
Amazon is extra pumped—she can't back down
here.
